# MLStyleTransfer.ModelParameters.ModelAlgorithmType.cnn

**Case**

A style-transfer training algorithm that generates a model that prioritizes image quality over speed.

## Declaration

```swift
case cnn
```

## Selecting an algorithm type

- **MLStyleTransfer.ModelParameters.ModelAlgorithmType.cnnLite**: A style-transfer training algorithm that generates a model that prioritizes speed over image quality.
